public_reputation: Route legend who treated rumor, weather, and food security as one map.
appearance: Route-ready clothing, travel wear, and movement-focused gear make timing and distance part of their public look.
manner: Thinks in movement, timing, and obstacle management, treating delay as a concrete threat. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a scouts still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of scouts in and around Nomdara Caravan, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Nomdara Caravan workable through the obligations of scouts while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep movement possible despite weather, chokepoints, rumor, and shifting authority. Around Nomdara Caravan, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of scouts visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Orem Lantern-Step can pull the party into chokepoints, timing failures, or rival claims over how movement should happen.
Orem Lantern-Step will share route intelligence, hidden timing, or safer alternatives if the party proves useful under travel pressure.
Orem Lantern-Step needs help reading a blocked path, escorting traffic, or reopening safe movement through Nomdara Caravan.
Orem Lantern-Step needs help with a problem in Nomdara Caravan that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Integrated from the prior_release canon-ready named-NPC ledger append. Unsupported fields remain restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Travel kit, route marks, and timing-focused movement signal that Orem Lantern-Step lives by roads, passages, or convoy rhythm.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Nomdara Caravan: roads, caravan nodes, docks, ferries, route desks, or loading seams
who_avoids_them: those who do not respect route discipline
